canvas.description: Root application and workspace background behind primary surfaces.
useWhen: paint the outermost Design Lab canvas

primary.description: Default background for primary panels and content surfaces.

secondary.description: Quiet nested surface for controls, rails, and secondary regions.

raised.description: Elevated surface for popovers, dialogs, and content above the base plane.

hover.description: Transient background for hovered or softly selected interactive surfaces.

subtle.description: Low-emphasis divider for grouping adjacent surfaces without creating a hard boundary.

default.description: Standard outline for controls, cards, and interactive boundaries.

strong.description: High-emphasis outline for hover, active, or contrast-critical boundaries.

primary.description: Highest-emphasis readable text for titles, values, and primary content.

secondary.description: Supporting readable text for labels, descriptions, and secondary content.

muted.description: Low-emphasis text for metadata and quiet supporting information.

disabled.description: Text and icon color for unavailable controls and deliberately de-emphasized content.

primary.description: Primary brand accent for selected controls, focus, key actions, and active identity.

secondary.description: Secondary brand accent for complementary highlights that must not compete with primary actions.

code.description: Foreground for source code, import statements, token values, and filesystem references.

component.description: Stable purple identity for Component boundaries in visual inspection and developer handoff.

slot.description: Stable pink identity for named Component slot boundaries in visual inspection and developer handoff.

dark-a.description: Dark Workbench checkerboard base used behind component specimens.

light-a.description: Light Workbench checkerboard base used behind component specimens.

success.description: Semantic color for completed, healthy, valid, or successful states.

warning.description: Semantic color for caution, pending attention, or non-blocking risk.

danger.description: Semantic color for errors, destructive actions, failures, and blocked states.

scrim.description: Modal backdrop that separates dialogs and blocking overlays from the application below.

icon.description: Default square size for semantic interface icons.

small.description: Compact control height for dense inspectors and constrained toolbars.

medium.description: Default control height and minimum target for standard interface actions.

collapsed.description: Width of the icon-only Application Sidebar rail.

expanded.description: Width of the Application Sidebar while module labels are disclosed.

navigation.description: Combined width budget shared by Application Sidebar and Directory Panel.

navigation-min.description: Minimum combined navigation width before the workspace would become unusable.

directory-panel-min.description: Minimum readable width of the semantic Directory Panel.

workspace-min.description: Minimum width reserved for the main Design Lab workspace.

tab-height.description: Fixed row height for primary Sidebar Tab navigation items.

1.description: Smallest spacing step for tight inline gaps and compact catalog grids.

2.description: Compact spacing step for related controls, labels, and dense content.

3.description: Default internal spacing for controls, panels, and grouped interface content.

4.description: Standard section inset and separation between distinct interface groups.

small.description: Compact corner radius for buttons, fields, chips, and small controls.

medium.description: Default corner radius for panels, popovers, and medium surfaces.

card.description: Large stable corner radius reserved for catalog and content cards.

fast.description: Short interaction transition for hover, focus, selection, and compact layout changes.

preview.description: Deliberate catalog preview motion duration triggered by card hover or focus.
Shared easing curve for authored catalog preview motion.

family.value: Inter, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif
family.description: Primary sans-serif family stack for application controls, labels, body copy, and headings.

size.description: Default compact interface body and control text size.

line-height.description: Default readable line height for interface body copy.

weight.description: Default heading weight for module titles and structured content headings.
